summary: Map Amazon Ads env vars into OAuth refresh fields, persist local .env credentials, and add profile ID selection.
reason: Amazon Ads requires both LWA refresh-token credentials and a selected advertising profile scope header on normal API calls; local .env loading and saving keeps setup usable without shell-sourcing secrets.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/adsanalytics ./internal/client ./internal/cli ./internal/config passes; auth setup and doctor point to auth login --port 8085 with the localhost callback URL, verify-mode auth login emits the callback URL without opening a browser, auth login auto-selects a single returned advertising profile, provider 401 details surface for authorization-code and refresh-token failures, and incompatible/malformed seller-store data is reported in TACOS notes.
